package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for go_perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_time_now_called_many_times_per_item: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Hot path optimization. Flag repeated time.Now calls inside per-item loops where one timestamp would suffice.
type CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItem(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerHotPathOptimizationTimeNowCalledManyTimesPerItemDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_hot_path"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items {
        queuedAt := time.Now()
        sentAt := time.Now()
        loggedAt := time.Now()
        _ = queuedAt.Before(sentAt) || loggedAt.After(sentAt)
        _ = strings.ToLower(item.ID)
    }
    perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "hot": 3, "path": 4, "optimization": 5, "time": 6}
    perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_positive_0 := perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_positive_0
    layer_positive_1 := perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_positive_1
    hot_positive_2 := perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive["hot"] + len(input)
    _ = hot_positive_2
    path_positive_3 := perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive["path"] + len(input)
    _ = path_positive_3
    optimization_positive_4 := perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive["optimization"] + len(input)
    _ = optimization_positive_4
    time_positive_5 := perf_layer_hot_path_optimization_positive["time"] + len(input)
    _ = time_positive_5
    return nil
}
